entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop being studied for nitrogen production and productivity in tropical soils.

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: An essential nutrient whose deficiency limits rice production.

entities.name: NITROGEN DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A state of lacking nitrogen that limits rice production and productivity in tropical soils.

entities.name: TROPICAL SOILS
entities.description: The type of soils where nitrogen deficiency limits rice production.

entities.name: CHEMICAL FERTILIZERS
entities.description: External inputs of nitrogen used to increase crop productivity.

entities.name: INDIGENOUS N SUPPLY
entities.description: The natural supply of nitrogen available within the soil.

entities.name: N SUPPLYING CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of a soil to provide nitrogen to the crop.

entities.name: AMMONIUM PRODUCTION
entities.description: The key process in the nitrogen nutrition of wetland rice, where nitrogen mineralization halts in submerged soils.

entities.name: N MINERALIZATION
entities.description: The process of converting organic nitrogen to inorganic forms, which halts at ammonium production in submerged soils.

entities.name: SUBMERGED SOILS
entities.description: Soils that are underwater, causing nitrogen mineralization to halt at ammonium production.

entities.name: ORGANIC MATTER
entities.description: A soil component that controls ammonium production in submerged soils.

entities.name: REDUCIBLE IRON
entities.description: A soil component that controls ammonium production in submerged soils.

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The region where the 15 diverse rice soils studied in the paper are located.

entities.name: REGRESSION EQUATION
entities.description: A mathematical tool connecting organic carbon and reducible iron with ammonium released to predict ammonium production.

entities.name: ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: A component of organic matter used as a predictor for ammonium production.

entities.name: EDTA
entities.description: A chemical agent used for the extraction of reducible iron.

entities.name: AMMONIUM OXALATE
entities.description: A chemical agent used for the extraction of reducible iron.

entities.name: WATERLOGGED CONDITION
entities.description: The state of soil saturation under which ammonium is released.

entities.name: CHEMICAL INDEX
entities.description: A simple and rapid index based on organic carbon and reducible iron contents used to estimate the N supplying capacity of wetland rice soils.

relationships.description: is the location of the studied
is the condition under which ammonium is released
